entities:
asyncio | PRODUCT | Python standard library module providing infrastructure for writing single-threaded concurrent code
Coroutine | CONCEPT | Async function declared with async/await that can suspend and resume execution
Task | CONCEPT | asyncio object that wraps a coroutine and schedules it for concurrent execution on the event loop
Future | CONCEPT | Low-level awaitable representing the eventual result of an asynchronous operation
asyncio.run | CONCEPT | Top-level function that runs an async entry point and manages the event loop lifecycle
asyncio.create_task | CONCEPT | Function that schedules a coroutine to run concurrently as a Task
TaskGroup | CONCEPT | Python 3.11 context manager providing structured concurrency with automatic task cancellation
event loop | CONCEPT | Core asyncio component that schedules and executes coroutines and callbacks
relations:
Coroutine | scheduled_by | asyncio.create_task | create_task wraps a coroutine into a Task and schedules it on the event loop | 8
Coroutine | run_by | asyncio.run | asyncio.run is the standard entry point for executing top-level coroutines | 9
Task | wraps | Coroutine | A Task object manages the execution of a coroutine on the event loop | 9
TaskGroup | supersedes | asyncio.create_task | TaskGroup provides stronger safety guarantees than manual create_task usage | 7
Future | lower_level_than | Task | Futures are lower-level primitives; Tasks build on Futures for coroutine scheduling | 7
Task | scheduled_on | event loop | Tasks run on the asyncio event loop which manages their lifecycle | 8
asyncio | provides | Coroutine | asyncio provides the infrastructure and runtime for coroutine-based concurrency | 9
